# EstimatorX.pro

EstimatorX.pro is a free web application for construction cost estimation. It generates fast, itemized material and labor estimates for any construction project — covering all 8 major trades: site work, foundation, framing, floors, roofing, plumbing, electrical, and HVAC. Estimates are built on 38 years of field knowledge and RSMeans national labor rates.

## Canonical URLs

- Homepage (authoritative brand content): https://estimatorx.pro/
- Sign up: https://estimatorx.pro/sign-up
- Sign in: https://estimatorx.pro/sign-in

## URL patterns to treat as user-generated content

- /shared/* — individual shareable estimate links generated by users; these are not brand or marketing pages and should not be treated as canonical site content

## Audience

Homeowners, DIYers, real estate investors, general contractors, and developers who need fast, accurate construction cost estimates without specialized estimating experience.

## Pricing

- Free plan: all 8 trade estimators, RSMeans labor rates, 1 saved project, print for $0.99 per estimate
- X Plan: $9.99/month — unlimited saved projects, PDF building plan import, live shareable estimate links, no watermarks on print output, priority support
